targets.boundary: Entire value chain (corporate operations, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle).
targets.notes: Apple plans to reduce absolute GHG emissions by 75% from 2015 levels by 2030 before neutralizing residual emissions.
targets.title: 75% absolute GHG reduction by 2030 vs 2015 across full value chain

targets.boundary: Entire value chain (corporate operations, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle).
targets.notes: Apple aims to achieve carbon neutrality across its entire value chain by 2030 using emission reductions and high-quality removals.
targets.title: Net-zero (carbon neutral) across full value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Global corporate operations (offices, retail stores, and data centers).
targets.notes: Apple maintains carbon neutrality for its corporate operations through emission reductions and offsets.
targets.title: Carbon neutral corporate operations
